passiveAbilities.name: Enchanted Secateurs
passiveAbilities.description: All Melee damage generated by this model count as Magical instead of the listed type.

activeAbilities.name: Wyrm Hole
activeAbilities.description:
This model must be in base contact with an item of Obstacle terrain to use this ability. Lose possession of any Moonstones this character is in possession of (place them
in base contact with a depth value of 1), then place this model in base contact with any item of Obstacle terrain on the board.

arcaneAbilities.name: Bug Spray
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X Magical Dmg.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Insatiable Hunger
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy is slain, and this character is not slain, then this character recovers all Wds and all energy.
